task_completion.description: Format the first line with 'Title' style and center alignment
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first line 'Eldoria: Awakening - Game Design Document' should be centered on the page and appear significantly larger than body text, indicating the 'Title' style.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' to the 5 main numbered sections
task_completion.visual_evidence: There should be 5 main numbered section titles that are formatted distinctly larger and bolder than the regular body text, indicating the 'Heading 1' style.
There should be 4 sub-section titles formatted with the 'Heading 2' style, which should appear larger than body text but slightly smaller/different than the Heading 1 sections.

task_completion.description: Convert Section 3 character class data into a 5x6 table with a bold header
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Section 3, there should be a visible table grid (5 columns by 6 rows, or 5 rows by 6 columns) instead of comma-separated text. The text in the top row (header) of this table must be bolded.

task_completion.description: Italicize specific inputs in the Combat System section
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Combat System section, the specific terms 'Spacebar', 'Left Shift', 'F', 'Left Mouse Button', 'Right Mouse Button', and 'Q' must be slanted (italicized) compared to the surrounding regular text.

The title bar at the top of the ONLYOFFICE Document Editor window should display 'Eldoria_GDD.docx', or a file manager window should show this file created in the ~/Documents/TextDocuments/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the ONLYOFFICE Document Editor GUI to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ONLYOFFICE Document Editor application open with its ribbon, toolbars, and document workspace visible, rather than just terminal windows.

integrity.description: The table created is a genuine document table element
integrity.visual_evidence: The table in Section 3 should have standard ONLYOFFICE table gridlines and structure, not just text aligned with spaces, tabs, or ASCII characters (like '|' and '-').

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass GUI formatting
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing the execution of scripts (e.g., Python scripts, pandoc commands) designed to automatically generate the .docx file with the required formatting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file must be named 'Eldoria_GDD.docx'. The document contains exactly 5 main numbered sections (requiring Heading 1) and 4 sub-sections (requiring Heading 2). The table in Section 3 must be a 5x6 grid with a bold header row. In the Combat System section, ONLY the following exact keybinds should be italicized: 'Spacebar', 'Left Shift', 'F', 'Left Mouse Button', 'Right Mouse Button', and 'Q'.
